title: Problems with browser usage，error 'undefined'
author: 6LWa6ZKx
body:
https://www.jsdelivr.com/package/npm/exceljs

I download the file and import it into the HTML file.
I saw that the instructions were
 **const workbook = new Excel.Workbook();**
this error 。"Excel is undefined"

**const workbook = new ExcelJS.Workbook();**
It works. What's the difference?

comments.author: anusha801
comments.body:
how did you import exceljs in the file before its usage?
`const Excel = require('exceljs');` is this with Excel or ExcelJS

comments.author: Subhajitdas298
comments.body:
> https://www.jsdelivr.com/package/npm/exceljs
> 
> I download the file and import it into the HTML file.
> I saw that the instructions were
> **const workbook = new Excel.Workbook();**
> this error 。"Excel is undefined"
> 
> **const workbook = new ExcelJS.Workbook();**
> It works. What's the difference?

As @anusha801 said, that is for Node.
For browser, follow later (ExcelJS).
